---
title: "test_verify_fish.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_verify_fish.py"
loc: 7
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.25
style_score: 6.97
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.72
---

## Intent
The `test_verify_fish.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_verify_system_integrity, MockMuninn, __init__. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_verify_system_integrity, MockMuninn, __init__. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 7.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.debug.verify_fish](file://src.tools.debug.verify_fish)

### Exports
- `test_verify_system_integrity`
- `MockMuninn`
- `__init__`
